title: sanguisorba minor subvar. virescens
intro: Sanguisorba minor subvar. virescens, also known as Redstem Sanguisorba or Red-stemmed Burnet, is a variant of the Sanguisorba minor plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sanguisorba minor subvar. virescens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
